prompt: Create an intimate photorealistic close-up portrait of a young East Asian woman lying on her side in bed in soft morning light, with her face filling most of the square frame and angled diagonally from upper right to lower left. She has natural black straight hair with wispy bangs, warm brown reflective eyes, smooth natural skin, subtle lips, and a calm sleepy expression as she gazes directly at the viewer. Her hand is blurred in the extreme foreground near the bottom edge, and pale green bedding or a soft patterned pajama sleeve surrounds her face. Use shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh, gentle sunlight streaking across her cheek and nose, soft green background tones, natural window light, realistic skin texture, cinematic warmth, high-detail photography, 1:1 square composition, no text, no watermark, no heavy makeup, no harsh contrast.
